_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: The same relationship was also seen when using head circumference Z scores from CHOP charts instead of LMSz charts (Standardized beta = 0.21; 95% CI = [0.02, 0.39]; P < 0.03)
details: CHOP charts using GAMLSS showed significant relationship with developmental delay (Standardized beta = 0.21; 95% CI = [0.02, 0.39]; P < 0.03)
